message: fix(security): real crypto for OAuth/OIDC and harden HTTP parsing

files.patch:
@@ -737,11 +737,14 @@ dependencies = [
  "fastmcp-core",
  "fastmcp-protocol",
  "fastmcp-transport",
+ "getrandom 0.3.4",
+ "hmac",
  "jsonwebtoken",
  "log",
  "redis",
  "serde",
  "serde_json",
+ "sha2",
 ]

@@ -1456,6 +1459,16 @@ version = "0.2.0"

@@ -59,6 +59,10 @@ dirs = "6"
 # Cryptographic RNG (for WebSocket masking)
 getrandom = "0.3"
 
+# Cryptography (OAuth PKCE, OIDC signing)
+sha2 = "0.10.8"
+hmac = "0.12.1"
+
 # CLI argument parsing
 clap = { version = "4", features = ["derive", "env", "wrap_help"] }

@@ -474,7 +474,7 @@ async fn critical_write(ctx: &McpContext, data: String) -> String {
 | **Nightly Required** | Uses Rust 2024 edition features |
 | **Network Transports** | SSE and WebSocket transports are implemented at the transport layer, but HTTP/WS server integration is external |
 | **No Built-in TLS** | Transport encryption must be handled externally |
-| **Single-threaded Loop** | Main server loop is sequential (parallel handlers planned) |
+| **Single-threaded Loop** | Main server loop is sequential |
 | **Sibling Dependency** | Requires asupersync at `../asupersync` |
 | **Early Development** | API may change before 1.0 |

@@ -24,6 +24,9 @@ serde_json.workspace = true
 log.workspace = true
 chrono.workspace = true
 base64.workspace = true
+getrandom.workspace = true
+sha2.workspace = true
+hmac.workspace = true
 redis = { workspace = true, optional = true }
 jsonwebtoken = { version = "10.2.0", default-features = false, features = ["rust_crypto"], optional = true }
